rule_text: ALL | For Discontinued Plans (When Stock Is Unavailable) - Free replacement will be provided based on the following conditions: - SIM ⇔ SIM only - Wi-Fi ⇔ Wi-Fi only - SIM ⇔ Wi-Fi exchanges are not allowed (not covered by free replacement). *The new plan’s monthly fee will apply after replacement. *Discount Group approval is required before any free replacement. *Customer-requested changes (not due to malfunction) are not covered by this rule.
Common KINTONE STATUS | MEANING | ACTION REQUIRED
IN USE | Signal is IN USE and Active | Currently use by customer, need to pay on time to keep this signal
IN USE with Resume date (applied) | In case of still no signal after 2-3 working days | Request in AR to check and to resume signal again
For Re-issue - Unpaid | Signal is in STOPPED due to unpaid bill | Customer need to pay within 7 days from the stop date to resume the signal
MUST RETURN | Signal is in STOPPED due to must return item | Customer need to return within 7 days
For Re-issue - Must Return | Signal is in STOPPED due to unreturned | Customer need to return within 7 days from the stop date to cancel, if not it will be Re-issued
For Re-issue - Lost sim | Signal is in STOPPED due to lost item | Cannot be cancelled, need to pay Lost fee refer to | LOST ITEM RULES tab

IN USE: To-be Re-issue | No payment within 7 days from Stop date. Signal is for PERMANENTLY Disconnection (Re-issue) | Can still request to resume signal after payment, but need to ask AR first if re-issue list is not yet submitted to provider
-If already sent, signal cannot be resume (Re-issue already)

IN USE: For Cancellation | No payment within 7 days from Stop date. Signal is for permanently disconnection (Re-issue) | Can still request to resume signal after payment, but need to ask AR first if re-issue list is not yet submitted to provider
- for Cancel Contract to Provider | -If already sent, signal cannot be resume (cancel contract already)
RE-ISSUING: Waiting new sim | Permanently disconnected | Customer need to pay Termination Fee (re-issue fee) refer to | Re-issue Rule tab
RE-ISSUE | Permanently disconnected | Customer need to pay Termination Fee (re-issue fee) refer to | Re-issue Rule tab
NOT AVAILABLE: Cancel Contract | Permanently disconnected | Customer need to pay Termination Fee (re-issue fee) refer to | Re-issue Rule tab
